echo (Energy and Commodity Holistic Optimiser)

Getting started

Installation

This package requires that you have python 3.7+ installed and it is recommended you use a virtual environment. To install this package you need to:

1. clone this repo git clone git@github.com:bsgip/echo.git

2. go into echo directory cd echo

3. with your virtual environment active install using pip pip install .[test,validation]

Note

This package is not on pypi. Doing pip install echo will NOT install this package. It will install a different package.

Solver executable

echo uses pyomo module to solve optimisation problems and thus needs at least one solver package installed.

The following solvers can be used.

Free for academic use only:

  • CPLEX (recommended): This has been tested the most. It requires a license but is free for academic users. To install, follow instructions IBM website.

  • GUROBI: Minimal testing: It requires a license but is free for academic users. Check gurobi website for instructions on installing.

Open source:

  • CBC: This solver can be used provided you only include linear costs (no quadratic costs or regularisation). Information on the solver is available here. For installing on ubuntu run sudo apt-get install -y coinor-cbc1
